_comment: Edit values here and restart agent.py to apply. No Python edits needed.
_comment_trust: Memory/processor allocation. memory_milestones = the ops-ceiling walls the agent rushes memory toward (memory x 1000 = ops cap), verified from the game wiki: 20=Stage1 cluster, 70=HypnoDrones, 120=Space Exploration, 175=OODA Loop, 250/300=Stage3 endgame. trust_proc_floor = minimum processors kept for ops regen before pouring trust into memory.
_comment_probe: Stage 3 Von Neumann probe-design targets — a 3-phase design that scales as Max Trust grows past 20 (wiki Stages 'Stage 3 Strategy'). PHASE 1 PRE-LAUNCH (15 trust): 1 each in Speed/Exploration(nav)/Factory/Harvester/Wire, 5 each in Self-Replication(rep) and Hazard(haz) — built before the first launch. PHASE 2 COMBAT RESERVE: held until combat opens (Drifters appear), then Combat is bought+allocated up to probe_combat_target (wiki: 6-8 'lose very few battles'; a big swarm that outnumbers the drifters needs no more). PHASE 3 COLONIZE: ALL remaining trust (as Max Trust rises via Honor) pours into Speed + Exploration, kept Speed>=Exploration, because matter/exploration rate = Speed x Exploration (wiki) — this is what drives colonized% up. haz/rep/speed/nav/combat = the phase-1/2 targets; spare beyond them goes to Speed/Exploration. probe_aux_max = points per Factory/Harvester/Wire.
_comment_swarm: entertain_creativity_floor = keep at least this much creativity in reserve before the override spends creativity on 'Entertain the Swarm' (revives a Bored swarm). Set above the Stage 3 creativity projects (Name the Battles 225k + Strategic Attachment 175k = 400k) so entertaining never starves them. Entertain costs 10k creativity the first time, +10k each subsequent.
